name: 21 Market
description: Developer of an e-commerce platform designed to inspect electronic device quality and resell them to consumers. The company purchases a variety of used electronic devices and sells them as verified refurbished products at the new product level through upcycling, packaging, and warranty, enabling consumers with refurbished products and increasing customer satisfaction.

name: AltoTech Global
description: Operator of an energy management platform intended to help hotel and building owners to manage their energy consumption. The company's platform helps to reduce the use of energy by automatically adjusting the temperature, mode, and operation of the air conditioning system and also helps in collecting electricity usage data for analysis and processing, enabling hotels to save money on their electricity bills, be more energy efficient, and at the end disrupt the hospitality and energy sectors with artificial intelligence.

name: AUS
description: Developer of a unique category of scalable end-to-end drone solutions designed for providing large-scale enterprise solutions for a variety of industries and infrastructure development. The company's drone solutions enables you to map about 150 hectares in a single flight with a secure proprietary 3D web-GIS platform developed to solve industry-specific challenges by processing over various images per instance with visual multi-stage quality checks, parallel processing and making use of optimized toolkits, automated workflows to give you 2D and 3D analysis and multiple types of data visualizations in an interactive dashboard using analytical outputs generated and help to create insightful analytics, enabling clients to make well-informed decisions in mining, urban planning, infrastructure, and agriculture.

name: BAYCON
description: Operator of a B2C and B2B eSIM platform called 'eSIM Easy" with an emphasis on elevating roaming services for inbound and outbound travelers globally.

name: Beervana International Limited
description: Producer and distributor of craft beer headquartered in Bangkok, Thailand. The company's products are hand-picked and served fresh, and cold beverages from cradle to glass.

name: Besuccess
description: Operator of a global media platform intended to offer business ideas and trends from all over the world. The company's platform offers applications that provide information about annual startup conferences as well as educational information to students or upcoming entrepreneurs, enabling users to begin their businesses with knowledge about the world and grow profitably.

name: BorrowMyDoggy
description: Provider of pet sitter services designed to connect pet owners with local dog borrowers for walks, weekends, and holidays. The company helps to link pet owners with local sitters for walks, home boarding, and holiday care, enabling dog owners to give dogs more exercise and playtime and allowing people without a pet to spend quality time with one.

name: CardMonster
description: Developer of both offline and online casual games, including board games, trading card games, and tabletop games. The company’s core strategy focuses on first creating and refining games in their offline form, such as board games and tabletop games. Once these concepts are well-tested and polished, they are then transitioned to online formats using the company’s proprietary game development platform.

name: Carnot Fleet
description: Developer of logistics technology designed to offer technology-driven means for cold storage transport on all forms of mobility.

name: Cars24
description: Operator of an online automotive marketplace intended to simplify the sale of used vehicles. The company's platform allows owners to book an appointment for inspection, prices vehicles based on AI algorithms and uses data to determine which car would give the new owner the least trouble, enabling customers to buy and sell their car seamlessly in a secure and efficient manner.

name: Chaart
description: Operator of an art asset management platform intended for collecting art in a smarter way. The company's platform manages art including original paintings, prints, art toys, posters, and goods, and tracks the value of the collection, enabling users to discover art trends through collectors' authentic collections.

name: Chaldal
description: Operator of an online shopping platform intended to offer groceries and daily essential products. The company's platform offers baby products, personal care products, pet food and groceries, enabling customers to buy goods of their own choice and get them delivered to their doorstep.

name: CLAP
description: Developer of management software designed for the onboarding process. The company's software is an integrated growth platform that connects employee goals, feedback, and performance and allows goal alignment, enabling firms to optimize their performance management culture, and providing communication and leadership guides for effective performance management.

name: Clinikk
description: Developer of a digital healthcare platform designed to make quality medical care accessible and affordable to neo-middle-class Indians. The company's platform including services like consultation, diagnostics tests, and EMR with doctors available around the clock and affordable health plans, enabling customers to get affordable and accessible services on demand.

name: Comento
description: Operator of recruiting platform intended to connect job hunters with employment opportunities. The company's platform uses artificial intelligence algorithms to create training boot camp programs and talent referral matching services along with peer-to-peer counseling, enabling job seekers to find the right job.

name: Dawaai
description: Developer of an online pharmacy platform intended to offer and deliver medical and health essentials. The company's product catalog includes supplements, homeopathic products, herbal products, personal care items, wellness products, and medical equipment coupled with counseling and advisory services, enabling customers to access requisite healthcare services in a convenient and economical manner by getting discounts on medicines.

name: Enuma, Inc.
description: Developer of a game-based learning application designed to support and empower children to be independent learners. The company's application offers practice and support for preschool through second-grade math skills and a flexible learning architecture that includes a suite of mini-games, books, videos, and quizzes along with a free-reign library, enabling children to gain confidence and independence while building foundational skills.

name: FarMart
description: Developer of food supply platform designed to connect farmers and share farm-related information easily. The company's platform connects farmers with retailers and food businesses and helps in sourcing farm produce at competitive prices, enabling farmers to sell their products easily.

name: Finda
description: Operator of an online loan comparison platform intended to differentiate between various financial products. The company's platform collects information on financial products, recommends suitable products, and provides economic calculation services for housing loans, monthly savings, loan repayment purposes, mortgages, personal loans, and investments, enabling users to make informed financial decisions.

name: FireVisor
description: Developer of a factory analysis platform designed to automate manufacturing processes. The company's platform leverages artificial intelligence and machine learning to detect, analyze and monitor manufacturing defects thereby reducing the cost of poor quality, enabling clients to reduce manual labor hours and increase profits.

name: FT Cash
description: Developer of a mobile payments platform designed to empower micro-merchants and SMEs through financial inclusion using digital payments and loans. The company's platform features the ability to accept payments through multiple payment instruments including debit cards, credit cards, and mobile wallets, enabling merchants to accept electronic payments without any additional hardware or POS device.

name: H2O Hospitality
description: Developer of digital transformation solutions for the hospitality industry revolutionizing hospitality facilities’ operational flow and value chain. H2O enables smart mobile check-in & check-out, 100% automatic reservation, and optimizes the funnel and processing of valuable data to increase direct sales volume.

name: Habitus Associates
description: Developer of online art platform called Artue aimed at transforming traditional methods of art exhibition and transaction into an online-centric approach.

name: Hacker Earth
description: Developer of an artificial intelligence-powered assessment platform intended to help large enterprises evaluate developers based on specific skills. The company's platform helps recruiters to identify and hire appropriate candidates from its community of developers and offers a skill assessment tool to computer programmers and endorses their capabilities through certifications, enabling recruiters to find the right candidate for technical jobs and also assess them.

name: HeadOut
description: Developer of an on-demand mobile marketplace designed to help travelers discover and book experiences and tours and to offer reliable and quality services in a fragmented industry. The company's marketplace helps to discover activities and events happening in town at a discounted prices, enabling travelers to find local experiences at the last minute.

name: Hopae
description: Stripe for Digital Identity. Hopae helps enterprises seamlessly integrate sophisticated wallet/eID verification systems worldwide without prior knowledge of DID technology or regulatory compliance.

name: Huinno
description: Developer of a clinical decision support system with AI-based cloud analysis software designed to provide biosignal data of ill patients. The company's system uses sensors and algorithms to monitor health data like blood pressure, and heart rate and also provides convenient diagnosis and treatment of patients with cardiac diseases such as arrhythmia, atrial fibrillation, and hypertension, enabling healthcare professionals to diagnose and make informed medical decisions while treating a patient.

name: Incognito Technologies
description: Provider of information technology services intended for effective quality assurance in the field of system solutions. The company manages the information technology infrastructure from concept to completion and develops industry-specific enterprise resource planning, enabling clients to access information technology products and services that comply with the latest trends in the market.

name: Khmer Home
description: Developer of a real estate platform designed to offer property management services. The company's platform offers a new way to find houses, apartments, commercial properties and lands both for sale or rent, enabling people to make hassle-free real estate transactions.

name: KokkanLogis
description: Operator of Primo, an AI-powered freight transportation brokerage platform that seamlessly connects carriers and shippers while offering additional value-added services like electronic billing and freight control.

name: LawnGuru
description: Provider of an outside-the-home services marketplace intended to connect consumers with professionals. The company's services include recurring mowing, yard clean-ups, seeding, mulching, weeding, and snow clearing among others, enabling customers to book services instantly, using an artificial intelligence-powered satellite mapping tool, or request competitive quotes from top-rated crews nearby

name: Medir
description: Operator of online medical care and prescription drug delivery platform intended to serve medical consumers, hospitals, and pharmacies. The company's platform offers a structure in which a delivery person delivers prescription drugs to users at a pharmacy close to the hospital where they received treatment and a hyperlocal policy that only exposes nearby hospitals based on their location, enabling patients to get treatment safely and quickly from the specialists in their neighborhood.

name: MemeChat
description: Developer of an online platform intended to help meme creators receive remuneration from brands for their content. The company's platform leverages technology to provide a space for users to express themselves in the form of memes on a plethora of issues and also for brands to access those memes, enabling creators to create memes using paid templates and get paid upon their approval or earn making memes in the requested category and get paid.

name: MomMom
description: Provider of childcare information services intended to offer smart parenting. The company provides deals scanners, trending childcare items, mom blogs, parenting tips from experts as well as shopping for children along with other related information, allowing pregnant women and new parents to access childcare tips and objects.

name: Aggra
description: Developer of an automated debt collection platform designed to improve default recovery rates. The company's platform utilizes machine learning to automate all processes related to agent allocation, communication and settlement decision-making, assisting lenders to reduce their recovery costs as well as default rates, enabling users to become efficient and improve their debt recovery process while still maintaining friendly relations with their clients.

name: Newneek
description: Operator of a digital media platform intended to publish news articles online. The company's platform offers e-mail newsletters that convey current issues that are provided on a subscription basis directly to the reader with a focus on authenticity and humor, enabling subscribers to get access to daily news in the mail.

name: Niramai
description: Developer of a medical device designed to detect breast cancer at a much earlier stage than traditional methods or self-examination. The company's device uses an imaging method that is radiation-free, non-touch, not painful, works for women of all ages, and employs artificial intelligence and machine learning algorithms for early and accurate breast cancer screening, enabling healthcare practitioners to detect breast cancer for screening in rural and semi-urban areas.

name: Notti
description: Operator of an online store intended to change the pet industry in Malaysia. The company offers slow-baked, grain-free kibbles made with protein content and human-grade fresh meat designed to support pet health and wellness, enabling owners to provide healthy food option to their pets.

name: OPGG
description: Operator of an e-gaming data analytics company intended to build a better gaming ecosystem for all gamers. The company's platform creates profiles for gamers by analyzing game data from the games they play and can improve their gameplay and see the game performance of their opponents and friends, providing players with the necessary insight into the games to improve their gaming performance.

name: Oto Capital
description: Provider of automotive leasing services intended to offer convenient alternatives to purchasing personal vehicles. The company offers various installment plans where the buyer can purchase and return vehicles after a certain period of time by paying interest for the lease contract, enabling customers to have an affordable and flexible way of operating a two-wheeler.

name: Pandorum Technologies
description: Developer of functional human tissues designed for tissue engineering and regenerative medicine. The company's experimental-stage human liver tissue is created using three-dimensional printing technology and acts as an artificial liver during liver failures or liver transplantation and takes less time to regenerate, enabling surgeons to assure painless liver surgeries.

name: Payple
description: Developer of a financial platform designed to offer payment services with a focus on increasing the payment conversion rate. The company's platform focuses on increasing customer conversion rates by analyzing the data necessary for direct marketing and allows automated payments and transfers with API integration, enabling clients to conveniently use credit cards and direct transfer payment methods and expand their business scope.

name: PeopleFund, Perfect Technologies
description: Developer of a lending platform designed to process all loans through a bank-integrated system. The company's platform operates with banks and other financial institutions to ease the lending process and the loan is made available via various third-party applications as well, enabling customers to get a personal loan at a low-interest rate.

name: Planby Technologies
description: Developer of an AI-powered interior design automation platform designed to streamline the design process. The company's platform leverages artificial intelligence to create custom interior designs in less than a minute with various settings, enabling users to create designs that match their preferences while reducing unnecessary time and delivering designs quickly.

name: Playcurio
description: Developer of a learning platform designed to make learning fun through the combination of real teaching aids and digital contents. The company's platform offers augmented reality and virtual reality content with accessibility to tablets, pc, mobile, television and 3D animation and presents joy to children with quality digital contents, enabling children to learn while playing.

name: PopXO
description: Provider of an online influencer marketing community platform intended to blend content and commerce. The company's platform is based on a digital publication that creates stories, videos, and social media content in six languages about the things young Indian women care about including fashion, beauty, lifestyle, weddings, and work-related topics and publish on the platform, thereby enabling women to lead their lives through data-driven insights.

name: Prevenotics
description: Developer of an AI medical diagnosis software designed to detect cancer or precancerous stages based on endoscopic data. The company's AI technology helps accurately diagnose cancer and predict conditions and diseases that can spread to cancer in advance, enabling patients in need of preventive management to actively manage their disease.

name: PUBLY
description: Developer of an online content platform designed to offer content subscription services for working people. The company's platform creates, designs, archives, stores and publishes custom content and events that can be paid for and reserved for future reference, enabling users to buy and publish content from a variety of media sources that are yet to be released.

name: Qerja
description: Provider of an online job seeking portal intended to assist people to find jobs.

name: Reality Reflection
description: Developer of a virtual reality software designed to build lifelike 3D models in a detailed resolution. The company's software provides immersion and reality with a level of full high-definition to create virtual reality games, photo-realistic characters, high-fidelity facial animations, and interactive content for its clients, enabling gaming companies to use it in various computer games and multimedia products.

name: Resulticks
description: Interakt.co simplifies customer data analysis, marketing and interaction.

name: RippleHire
description: Developer of recruitment SaaS platform intended to identify correct candidates from employees' social networks and gamify the employee referral program. The company platform offers game-based employee referral software for recruiters and referral programs with contests and bonuses to engage employees in the recruitment process, enabling the human resources team with a performance hiring engine using the talent acquisition cloud.

name: SAIB & Co.
description: Manufacturer of intimate cosmetics intended to tackle the entrenched cultural taboos around female sexuality. The company's offerings include sexual wellness products like a condom made from plant latex without unnecessary additives and artificial pigments designed from the perspective of women, enabling women to feel comfortable and proud to carry them without any shame or stigma.

name: Sankun
description: Developer of construction software intended to provide information about construction perfection. The company's platform provides total purchasing alternatives that encompass bidding, project management, and evaluation, and provides data regarding construction-related companies, enabling businesses to receive good construction methods.

name: Sheroes
description: Developer of a women's community platform designed to offer support, resources, opportunities, and interactions, discuss health, career, relationships, get work-from-home jobs, and more. The company's platform offers a diverse range of engagement formats to women, including corporate jobs, returning professionals programs, partner programs, part-time work, freelancing, and franchising, enabling women to find mentorship and career content while also helping them with personal advice via growth channels of community, content, champions, conversations, commerce, and companies.

name: KartRocket
description: Developer of an e-commerce shipping and enablement application designed to offer negotiated freight rates. The company's platform employs a machine-learning-based data engine that recommends proper courier service for a business and chooses a courier company, prints shipping labels, and tracks orders from a single panel, enabling businesses to manage their shipping and returns simply and effectively.

name: Shweproperty
description: Operator of an online classifieds platform intended to match job demand with supply in various industries. The company's platform connects real estate buyers with sellers and job aspirants with job providers which effectively matches employers with the most suitable candidates to fill their jobs, hosting an annual calendar of career conferences and educational seminars, enabling consumers to encourage and recognize the best practices in human resource management that reduces time and save costs.

name: Silveredge
description: Operator of an advertising platform intended to offer data-driven technologies to complex client problems. The company's platform focuses on developing proprietary metrics around advanced computer vision capabilities that can be applied to new use cases in the media industry, enabling brands to discover their most relevant audience through context-relevant video ad placement targeting, in a fully controlled and brand-safe environment.

name: Simpatico Project
description: Operator of a B2B mental healthcare platform intended to target the demand for psychological counseling from B2B customers and establish a healthy psychological counseling culture. The company develops a psychological counseling program optimized for the issues faced by executives and employees of companies and organizations in each field, such as executives of large corporations, lawyers and firefighters, enabling employees to match professional counselors in each field to provide corporate counseling through artificial intelligence.

name: Spenny
description: Developer of a micro-investing platform intended to invest roundup money in diversified portfolios. The company's platform collects spare change from daily digital transactions, rounds off the amount to the nearest ten rupee denomination and invests it into a diversified portfolio, enabling users to invest petty cash into various investment vehicles.

name: Splab
description: Developer of a scheduling automation tool designed to quickly and easily propose and coordinate team-level schedules. The company's tool offers an intuitive interface that allows users to check multiple schedules created by users in real time on one screen, enabling corporate sales and human resources teams to save a lot of time when setting up meetings with clients or interviews with candidates.

name: SpotDraft
description: Developer of an artificial intelligence-driven contract management platform designed to draft and execute legal contracts. The company's platform advises businesses about existing contracts without any additional cost or fees and sends customized reminders and invoices, enabling businesses to procure payment quickly and avoid all the confusing paperwork.

name: StalkBuyLove
description: Provider of an online marketplace designed to sell fashion apparel and accessories for women. The company's online marketplace stitches garments at scale with full integration into mobile distribution and supply, enabling consumers to get products of their choice at a low cost.

name: Stellapps
description: Operator of a dairy technology company intended to improve productivity, and quality and ensure end-to-end traceability across the dairy supply chain. The company's technology leverages advanced analytics and artificial intelligence through its full-stack IoT platform leading to dairy ecosystem partnerships with financial and insurance institutions, veterinary services, and cattle nutrition providers, enabling clients to create significant value for each stakeholder including smallholder farmers.

name: Storicity
description: Developer of a travel planning platform designed to recommend popular tourist destinations. The company's platform creates mobile audio guides through its artificial intelligence (AI) based chatbot that offers information about artifacts, and monuments while also providing assistance with a travel itinerary, enabling domestic and inbound individuals to plan their vacations in an efficient manner.

name: Suitable
description: Operator of employee referral platform designed to leverage referrals system and harness the power of team networks. The company's platform engages the employees in the hiring process with gamification and allows them to seamlessly track jobs, referrals & rewards, enabling recruiters to connect with potential talent from their social and professional networks.

name: Syncly
description: Developer of a customer feedback analysis platform intended to boost productivity by automating and streamlining the issue-reporting process. The company's platform helps in reporting bugs and usability feedback directly from the screen and also issues reporting resulting in a fast QA process, enabling clients to minimize their issue reporting process and spend time creating revenue.

name: TartanHQ
description: Developer of an employment data exchange platform designed to allow users to securely connect their payroll account to any business with their consent. The company's platform automatically extracts data from payslips, streamlines onboarding by pre-populating the customer's work and income information, and monitors income and employment data in real-time and on an ongoing basis, enabling clients accept any form of income and employment documentation to process automatically and securely.

name: Theres Camping
description: Operator of an outdoor community and commerce platform intended to provide outdoor information. The company provides information tailored to the level of customers at each stage and compares outdoor products that can be purchased through the sales channel, thus providing outdoor enthusiasts with relevant information.

name: Tiger New Energy
description: Manufacturer of reusable batteries intended to make clean mobility accessible to everyone in emerging countries. The company's battery-swapping technology allows for easy replacement and loading in charged batteries, enabling clients to adopt electric vehicles, contributing to the environment by reducing carbon emissions, and improving the quality of life for people.

name: TimeBlocks
description: Developer of a time management platform intended to manage daily and long-term plans. The company's platform offers a calendar library utilizing a structure-based drag-and-drop technology that eliminates the need for multiple page transitions to sync the current schedule and planned events in one place, enabling users to manage their schedules quicker than conventional calendar applications.

name: Veluga
description: Provider of beverage subscription services intended to serve handcrafted beer. The company's services include craft beer curation and subscription where members are delivered a themed box of hand-selected craft beers and food pairings every month, enabling members to enjoy their beverage drinks.

name: WinCL
description: Developer of climate action platform designed to offset carbon emissions. The company focuses on the environmental aspects of corporate operations, including ESG management and carbon credit purchase, marketplace, and carbon information provision, helping achieve true carbon-neutral win-win cooperation between developed and developing countries.

name: Wishup
description: Operator of an online concierge service platform intended to connect business owners to virtual assistants. The company's platform hires trains and manages experienced assistants to handle recurring and specialized tasks, providing clients to streamline operations and spend more time on core business functions.

name: Insightful Labs
description: Provider of a personalization marketing automation platform. The company offers an online platform that helps its users to manage customer life cycle through personalization, targeting and big data analytics.

name: WAH Holidays
description: Provider of an online travel search engine designed to seamlessly plan and book holidays. The company's online travel search engine is a platform that offers off-beat or popular destinations, honeymoon packages, family vacations, weekend trips and other getaway destinations, enabling users to search and book travel destinations, holiday packages, flights and hotels online.

name: Little Eye
description: Developer of analysis software for developers and testers of Android applications. The company provides a performance-analysis platform enabling developers to measure, analyze and optimize Android apps. The platform generates performance reports and does not require setup or coding - users plug their device in and begin profiling.

name: OnlineTyari
description: Provider of an online test preparation platform designed to help students to prepare for competitive exams. The company's platform delivers educational content and mock tests for job aspirants preparing for SSC, GATE, railways, IAS or bank examinations in India, enabling students to excel in their career.

name: SwitchMe
description: Provider of financial and lending services. The company offers their customers home loans and and other lending schemes when they wish to switch their home loans manually.

name: InstaPaisa
description: InstaPaisa leverages Big Data, and machine learning algorithms to make automated lending decisions and originate loans online in India.

name: Edukart
description: Provider of online educational services. The company offers an online marketplace where users can choose and enroll from more than 2,000 courses in degrees, diplomas, certifications, entrance coaching and K-12 categories.

name: Shakr Media
description: Provider of a video making platform designed to connect businesses of all sizes with success in the video first world. The company's platform offers over 2,000 video designs made by professional video designers and proprietary video editing & rendering technology to promote video ads on Facebook and Instagram, enabling anyone to make visually stunning and ROI generating video ads in minutes.

name: Zapr
description: Developer of digital signal processing and big data analytics software designed to drive unparalleled media insights & targeted TV to mobile audience engagement. The company's digital signal processing and big data analytics software tracks the offline behavior of their customers enabling them to identify and engage with viewers using a gamified approach, enabling brands and media businesses to market better.

name: Playcez
description: Provider of a local event discovery platform. The company's platform monitors social media and location check-in activity in an area and recommends popular events and activities to users by identifying locations like bars, restaurants, night clubs, among others in that area.

name: Uninstall
description: Developer of a data analysis platform designed to reduce application uninstalls. The company's data analysis platform uses an internal proprietary prediction engine that measures all huerstics and utilizes historical data to determine exactly which lot of users are going to uninstall an application in the next few days, enabling mobile application developers to engage with these users and prevent them from uninstalling.

name: Intap Labs
description: Provider of a cloud-based platform intended to offer language and culture learning services. The company's platform offers an application software which hosts intuitive audio-visual language, lessons and practice widgets in different languages, enabling learners to build their English vocabulary and in other languages.

name: Test Account for Smoke Testing By Shahroz
ZipDial
description: Provider of mobile marketing services. The company provides consumer intelligence platform that drives services such as couponing, friend referrals, on-pack activations.

name: Tapchief
description: Provider of a platform connecting individuals in need of professional advice. The company offers a cohesive platform to discover and schedule calls with experts to get advice across domains where users can choose with whom they would like to connect, book a time slot and receive consultation on the phone enabling users to make informed decisions taken with inputs from professional experts.

name: Qustn
description: Provider of self-service platform to train and assess remote employees. The company offers a cloud based learning and engagement platform that can be used by other businesses to train its employees.

name: PriceBaba
description: Provider of price comparison service. The company attempts to connect mobile phone buyers directly with mobile shops in their vicinity and compares prices and specs of mobile phones.

name: Tripoto Travel
description: Provider of an online publishing platform designed to connect global community of travelers around the world. The company's online publishing platform offers complete travel itineraries with travel photos, enabling users to plan tips with prior knowledge of the place.

name: VCNC
description: Provider of an online application platform intended for the couple to share photos and messages through their phone. The company's platform includes secret community, enabling users to chat privately anywhere.

name: OxfordCaps
description: Oxfordcaps is an online marketplace for booking student accommodation with thousands of verified properties.
